info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/unsubscribe/%7Btoken%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/unsubscribe/%7Btoken%7D", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/unsubscribe/%7Btoken%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"subscriptionStatus":true}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"subscriptionStatus\":true}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/unsubscribe/%7Btoken%7D", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

get.description: Get paginated unsubscribe list by baseId

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url 'http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/unsubscribe/list/%7BbaseId%7D?pageSize=SOME_INTEGER_VALUE&cursor=SOME_STRING_VALUE&search=SOME_STRING_VALUE' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/unsubscribe/list/%7BbaseId%7D?pageSize=SOME_INTEGER_VALUE&cursor=SOME_STRING_VALUE&search=SOME_STRING_VALUE", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/unsubscribe/export-list/%7BbaseId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/unsubscribe/export-list/%7BbaseId%7D", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

mimetype.description: MIME type of the uploaded file

width.description: Image width of the uploaded file

height.description: Image height of the uploaded file

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/unsubscribe/import-list/%7BbaseId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"notify":{"token":"xxxxxxxxxxx","size":1024,"url":"/bucket/xxxxx","path":"/table/xxxxxx","mimetype":"video/mp4","width":100,"height":100,"presignedUrl":"string"}}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"notify\":{\"token\":\"xxxxxxxxxxx\",\"size\":1024,\"url\":\"/bucket/xxxxx\",\"path\":\"/table/xxxxxx\",\"mimetype\":\"video/mp4\",\"width\":100,\"height\":100,\"presignedUrl\":\"string\"}}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/unsubscribe/import-list/%7BbaseId%7D", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))
